metadata.description: Agent Skills for Claude AI that help you choose and apply proven strategic frameworks for decision-making, problem-solving, and strategic thinking. 48 proven frameworks across 8 categories.

plugins.name: strategic-frameworks
plugins.description: Master strategic thinking with 48 proven frameworks. Choose the right framework for your situation (choose-framework), apply it through facilitated workshops (use-framework), and discover new frameworks to expand the system (discover-framework). From mental models to strategic analysis, unlock structured decision-making.
